title: The Fantastic Colors of Zhangye Danxia

scenes.text: These mountains look like a painter's palette.
scenes.query: Zhangye Danxia Geopark zhangye danxia landscape

scenes.text: This is Zhangye Danxia in Gansu province, China.
The stripes of color result from red sandstone uplifted over millions of years.
scenes.query: Zhangye Danxia Geopark zhangye danxia colors

scenes.text: Visit during sunrise for the most magical light.
scenes.query: Zhangye Danxia Geopark zhangye danxia sunrise
scenes.label: MAGICAL SUNRISE

scenes.text: Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Zhangye Danxia Geopark, Gansu - China. A breathtaking landscape that looks painted with vibrant colors. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
